name: Pulmatrix, Inc.
summary: . Overview We are a biopharmaceutical company that has focused on the development of novel inhaled therapeutic products intended to prevent and treat migraine and respiratory diseases with important unmet medical needs using our patented iSPERSE technology. Our proprietary product pipeline includes treatments for central nervous system (CNS) disorders such as acute migraine and serious lung diseases such as Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) and allergic bronchopulmonary aspergillosis ...
